Notes: Single UPDATE contains an add_rr followed by delete_rr for the exact same RR. Follow-up QUERY checks whether the RR exists after the server processes the contradictory update.

Steps.Description: Add then delete the exact same RR for y.campus.edu. within one UPDATE, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: y.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the contradictory UPDATE left y.campus.edu. present or absent.
